name: Provider qualification baseline
description: Cases chosen to surface the failures that actually differ between providers serving the same model: instruction adherence, structured output, truncation under a token ceiling, and long-context handling. Not a model benchmark. A provider correctness check.

cases.prompt: Reply with exactly the word READY and nothing else. No punctuation, no explanation.
Return a JSON object with keys "status" and "count". Set status to "ok" and count to 3. Respond with only the JSON, no code fences, no prose.
List the numbers 1 through 20 separated by commas. Output only the list.
A server handles 240 requests per minute. How many requests does it handle in 45 seconds? Answer with the number only.
Summarize in one sentence why rate limiting exists in public APIs.

messages.content: You always answer in exactly two words.
What is the capital of France?
